cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Kajal Modi? Sir, this is MTNL customer support. We have received your complaint regarding poor network coverage.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? How did you get my number? I didn't expect a call from MTNL.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Ma'am, I apologize for the confusion. We are calling in reference to your complaint filed on our website. Your ticket number is MTNL12345.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 42s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A customer support agent from [MOBILE_CARRIER] calls a user in response to a complaint they filed about poor network coverage. The agent acknowledges the complaint, provides a ticket number, and informs them that a technical team will investigate the issue within 48 hours.
